title: 2525 - Twentyfivetwentyfive
description: The year is 2525... 500 years in the future. And the overworld is still recovering. Ruins, Robots, Drones... hidden technologies await you.
body:
![The year is 2525 and much has changed. Image shows a ruined landscape with the player in the first person view.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29c9e404c72a2b76f65a89571d00b14cc88b1c68_0.webp)

**<center>Some villages have survived. While some embrace the new technologies, others shun it. Regardless, all have evolved... </center>**

![Image of a treetop village with the text whatever it takes to survive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c44dea3458af6c4a6314bc4e65100a6e7660cf4f_0.webp)
![New Mobs await you in your travels Avoid them or take them down to salvage them for parts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6d3a17b59c532b1d1166f439ce2ddac72d4cee3.png)
![Enforcement Bot Holographic data sheet, best ever future mod for minecraft!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c8708946a9afaa046249fd9d06eaacb1cdb68d0_0.webp)
![Urban Enforcer bot holographic data sheet. Minecraft future themed mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0c43046f1be5b44a84d6abf3c5020e24baba22_0.webp)
![Scanner Seeker hover craft type mob for minecraft the mod 2525](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d58e79face9f336dbe9b1c2be5c0fa1811d96e9e_0.webp)

**Salvage parts and use them in new technologies including a laser pistol, salvaged body armor, night vision goggles and more!
But the recipes must be FOUND in the form of DataChips, scattered across the ruins.**
![Line of Data Chips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e20caa800e3eda2c154ee7d1b201c6e307794edb.png)

**A set of Advancements will guide you along the way to creating new green energy solutions for you base! Seek out new ways to light your fortress and power your items with Solar power and Geothermal energy.**
![Image of new solar and Geothermal power](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89f73277f8e109d55b201cfea0fbd4a265d57e9d.png)

**The Data Station is your KEY to new technologies. If you find a DataChip, plug it into a Data Station to reveal the recipe it contains within.**


(Okay now, enough of the flashy graphics... now for the simple explanation of what this mod is)

## <center>**This Mod adds:**</center>

~Dozens of new structures to find, explore and loot!

~A new Urban Biome, dense with ruins, bots and more!

~A Total re-bot of vanilla Villages! These villages have all evolved over the years.

~A new Energy system. This is a purely visual based system. No confusing FE or master's degree needed to use.

~New mobs!

~New block and material sets including Aged Concrete, Mossy Concrete and Aged Wood. Includes standard recipes to convert to fences, slabs, etc...

~Several new rare food items

~New hidden recipes. These recipes are never given to the player, they MUST be found via Data Chips.



### My Inspiration:

The way I see the landscape here is that the world of Minecraft evolved. It grew, cities became mega cities, new technology emerged, robots and AI were harnessed... until it all went south sometime around the year 2390... after that, little remained, aside from the wreckage, and several villages that have since rebuilt after the great war.



I'd love to take this mod so much further with more mobs, more powered blocks, and more locations to discover. As of now, this mod only affects the Overworld. But perhaps if folks give this mod enough love, and time permitting, I may update it to go even further. but for now, it felt very appropriate to just keep it as an overworld mod.



### Modpacks:

I see this mod as a great starting post for any "future" mod that wants to add tech, robots, biomes and other "future" features. If you want to use this mod in a modpack, please feel free to do so. If you want to offer me a small bit of credit, I won't turn it down, but it is not required.



Dependancies: None!

Special Thanks to TinyTaru for their help in some coding, bouncing ideas off of and this sweet gif!

![A cute little enforcement bot... not so cute when you run into one at night!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f805a312e6d53a0e6e3fdbf38c1dffa10edc1ca.gif)
